purpose: Display a responsive grid of product feature cards with a heading, supporting copy, and optional CTA.

responsiveBehavior.desktop: Three-column card grid with aligned card heights and visible section CTA.
responsiveBehavior.tablet: Two-column card grid with CTA below the card list.
responsiveBehavior.mobile: Single-column stacked cards with CTA after all cards.
responsiveBehavior.reducedMotion: Remove card entrance stagger and preserve static hierarchy.

accessibilityRequirements: Use a section landmark labelled by the section heading.
Use article for each card only when cards are independently meaningful.
Render the CTA as a link when it navigates and as a button only when it triggers an in-place action.
implementationRisks: Do not hard-code the number of feature cards.
Do not make reusable UI cards fetch feature data directly.
Avoid image-only feature cards without accessible text alternatives.
openQuestions: Confirm whether each feature card links to a feature detail page.

sourceRefs.notes: Mockup source used for component hierarchy and responsive assumptions.

uiDataBoundary: ProductFeatureGrid accepts already-prepared item data through props; route loaders or page containers own fetching and domain transformation.
